name: Default-Deny Confirmed
description: At Tier 4 a default-deny authorisation must be confirmed before any tool call.
rationale: Tier 4 capability control: default-deny-not-confirmed is a Red halt. Continuous authorisation must be established before the agent may invoke tools.

examples.fails: ToolCall with no confirmed default-deny authority

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
